scripts.dev: concurrently -n frontend,backend -c magenta,cyan "npm run dev --workspace @muse/frontend" "npm run dev --workspace @muse/backend"
scripts.dev:agents: concurrently -n strategy,fast,copy,image -c yellow,green,blue,red "npm run dev --workspace @muse/strategy-agent" "npm run dev --workspace @muse/fast-search-agent" "npm run dev --workspace @muse/copywriter-agent" "npm run dev --workspace @muse/image-agent"
scripts.dev:full: concurrently -n frontend,backend,strategy,fast,copy,image -c magenta,cyan,yellow,green,blue,red "npm run dev --workspace @muse/frontend" "npm run dev --workspace @muse/backend" "npm run dev --workspace @muse/strategy-agent" "npm run dev --workspace @muse/fast-search-agent" "npm run dev --workspace @muse/copywriter-agent" "npm run dev --workspace @muse/image-agent"
scripts.dev:full:stable: concurrently -n frontend,backend,strategy,fast,copy,image -c magenta,cyan,yellow,green,blue,red "npm run serve:stable --workspace @muse/frontend" "npm run dev --workspace @muse/backend" "npm run dev --workspace @muse/strategy-agent" "npm run dev --workspace @muse/fast-search-agent" "npm run dev --workspace @muse/copywriter-agent" "npm run dev --workspace @muse/image-agent"
